channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Prove You’re Human is the next game from the 1000xResist devs
item.content:encoded:
1000xResist developer Sunset Visitor and Black Tabby Games, developers of Slay The Princess, have revealed Prove You’re Human. Sunset Visitor is developing the game while for Black Tabby Games this will be its first publishing endeavour. The basis of Prove You’re Human is that you need to stop an AI thinking it is human.

Prove You’re Human is not just about proving an AI wrong about its humanity, but also delves into what makes you human. In this world, the main character has been split into two. On one hand, you have the original human person living their life in the real world, and on the other is the version you will control which is a digital copy of that person. As the digital copy, you need to convince the AI known as Mesa that it is not a human being. That’s not all as outside of that you will meet other employees and roam a digital world in which you can create CAPTCHAs. You can also keep up to date with what your human body counterpart is doing. Then at the end there is a choice of either remerging the physical and digital versions of the main character together, or discarding the digital copy.

A release date is yet to be confirmed, but you can wishlist Prove You’re Human on Steam now.

Source: YouTube



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/04/09/prove-youre-human-is-the-next-game-from-the-1000xresist-devs/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
